div1.entryFree:
Bilbo, 1) a Spanish blade, a blade in general: to be compassed, like a good b., in the circumference of a peck, Wiv. III, 5, 112. I combat challenge of this latten b. I, 1, 165.
2) Bilboes, a kind of fetters annexed to bars of iron, used at sea for mutinous sailors: I lay worse than the mutines in the b. Hml. V, 2, 6.
